judge_result.short_rationale: Answer includes fresh air, but it misses the required immediate action to seek medical attention now for symptomatic inhalation exposure. It adds unsupported and wrong-incident advice (rinse nose, wash face, do not induce vomiting) and incorrectly limits escalation to only if symptoms persist, which conflicts with the source.
